[[File:Copium.png|thumb]]
Copium is a special category of [[Spiralling]] which is avoidant in its nature. Coping is when you move from one Spiral to another in response to a loss. 

Examples can include an incel trying to become a monk so sex is not considered a requirement of them anymore. 

Copium can appear to be [[Counter-Spiralling]] when it is in reality merely replacing one addiction for another, and as such it is ineffective at that goal.

[[Category:Spiralling]]
[[sn:Cope]]It is a form of parasitic processing
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
